milestone: Growing/Personal/Official is one status pill, not two badges
slice: A project card showed "GROWING" (the status pill) and "PERSONAL"/"OFFICIAL" (a separate badge) at the same time, reading as two contradictory states on one card -- these are meant to be a single progression, not independent facts. _annotateProjectBadges() now replaces the status pill's own text/class in place when a real Repository match is found (Official winning over Personal), instead of adding a second badge beside it. The diagnostic states (Repository unavailable/not configured/check failed) are left as a separate badge, since those describe the connectivity check itself, not the Project's own status, and don't read as a competing state.
